paragraphs.text: 鸭妈妈带着一群小鸭子去河边学游泳。小鸭子们看到水，有点害怕。
paragraphs.translation: Mother Duck takes a group of ducklings to the river to learn swimming. The ducklings see the water and feel a bit scared.

paragraphs.text: 鸭妈妈先跳进水里，嘎嘎嘎地叫着，好像在说：快下来吧，水里很好玩！
paragraphs.translation: Mother Duck jumps into the water first, quacking as if to say: Come on down, the water is fun!

paragraphs.text: 小鸭子们鼓起勇气，一只一只跳进水里。它们跟着妈妈游来游去，很快就学会了。
paragraphs.translation: The ducklings gathered their courage and jumped into the water one by one. They swam around following their mom and learned quickly.
